zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Boteler於1428年出生在英國斯塔福爾艾爾福德時，她的父親Sir John Boteler26歲，母親Isabel Harington24歲。她於1468年與John Leventhorpe在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1489年7月22日在英國享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Boteler于1428年出生在英国斯塔福爾艾爾福德时，她的父亲Sir John Boteler26岁，母亲Isabel Harington24岁。她于1468年与John Leventhorpe在英国英格兰賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1489年7月22日在英国享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Boteler was born in 1428, in Elford, Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir John Boteler, was 26 and her mother, Isabel Harington, was 24. She married John Leventhorpe in 1468, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 July 1489, in England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Boteler est née en 1428, à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Boteler, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Harington, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Leventhorpe en 1468, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 juillet 1489, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Boteler 1428 in Elford, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Boteler 26 und ihre Mutter Isabel Harington 24. Sie hat 1468 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom John Leventhorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. Juli 1489 im Alter von 61 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Boteler è nata il nel 1428 nel Elford, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Boteler, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabel Harington, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Leventhorpe nel 1468, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 luglio 1489, nel England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Botelerが1428年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John Botelerは26歳，母Isabel Haringtonは24歳であった。1468年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスでJohn Leventhorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1489年7月22日にイギリスで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Boteler(이)가 1428년 영국 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Boteler(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Harington(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 John Leventhorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1489년 7월 22일 영국에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Boteler nasceu em 1428, em Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Boteler, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Harington, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Leventhorpe em 1468, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de julho de 1489, em Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Boteler родилась в 1428 г. в местности элфорд, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Boteler было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Harington, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Leventhorpe в 1468 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 июля 1489 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Boteler nació en 1428, en Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Boteler, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Harington, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Leventhorpe en 1468, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de julio de 1489, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
